title: hibiscus surattensis var. furcatus
intro: Hibiscus surattensis var. furcatus, also known as the furcate hibiscus or Chinese hibiscus, is a variant of the hibiscus plant species that is native to tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of hibiscus surattensis var. furcatus include reducing blood pressure, lowering cholesterol levels, and alleviating symptoms of menopausal hot flashes, as well as being used to treat digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea, capsules, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
